zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey Sharples於1586年出生在英國爾維布波瑞時，他的父親Richard Sharples Jr.31歲，母親Cicely Caldwell27歲。他於1611年2月27日與Margaret Ashley在英國英格蘭爾維布波瑞結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1661年10月15日在英國爾維布波瑞享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾維布波瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey Sharples于1586年出生在英国爾維布波瑞时，他的父亲Richard Sharples Jr.31岁，母亲Cicely Caldwell27岁。他于1611年2月27日与Margaret Ashley在英国英格兰爾維布波瑞结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1661年10月15日在英国爾維布波瑞享年75岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾維布波瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Sharples
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Sharples (Lancashire). The etymology of the placename is uncertain; it may derive from Old English scearp ‘sharp, pointed, steep’ + lǣs ‘meadow’ or lēas, plural of lēah ‘wood, woodland, clearing’, or from scearpol ‘place characterized by a pointed feature, pointed hill’.

variants.name: Sharpley
meanings: habitational name from Sharplow in Tissington (Derbyshire), from Old English scearp ‘sharp, pointed’ + hlāw ‘hill, mound’.
variant of Sharples with loss of -s.

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey Sharples was born in 1586, in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England, his father, Richard Sharples Jr., was 31 and his mother, Cicely Caldwell, was 27. He married Margaret Ashley on 27 February 1611, in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 15 October 1661, in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey Sharples est né en 1586, à Wybunbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Sharples Jr., avait 31 ans et sa mère, Cicely Caldwell, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Ashley le 27 février 1611, à Wybunbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 15 octobre 1661, à Wybunbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Wybunbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Sharplesが1586年にイギリスチェシュアイアウイブンブリーで生まれた時，父Richard Sharples Jr.は31歳，母Cicely Caldwellは27歳であった。1611年2月27日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアウイブンブリーでMargaret Ashleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1661年10月15日にイギリスチェシュアイアウイブンブリーで75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアウイブンブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Sharples(이)가 1586년 영국 체실르 윈이버버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Sharples Jr.(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Cicely Caldwell(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1611년 2월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 윈이버버이에서 Margaret Ashley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1661년 10월 15일 영국 체실르 윈이버버이에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 윈이버버이에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Margaret Ashley em 27 de fevereiro de 1611, em Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de outubro de 1661, em Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey Sharples родился в 1586 г. в местности вибунбури, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Sharples Jr. было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Cicely Caldwell, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Ashley 27 февраля 1611 г. в местности вибунбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер 15 октября 1661 г. в местности вибунбури, чешир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности вибунбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

Murió el 15 de octubre de 1661, en Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
